title: The Sword and the Cross
writer: Francesco De Feo, Mario Guerra, Nicola Manzari
actors: Gianna Maria Canale, Jorge Mistral, Marisa Allasio
plot: Tarsus, in the Roman province of Cilicia, AD 120. Two Carthaginian sisters, Lea and Esther, are bought as slave girls by Roman tribune Marcus Valerius, who gives them as a present to proud Julia Martia, daughter of the proconsul. ...
